title: Comfy Survival
description: The Minecraft survival modpack mixing performance and graphics
body:
Fabric-based survival modpack made for low-spec devices to enjoy Minecraft to the limits.

---
### All-rounder

Comfy Survival has no content mods, so there's no need to worry that some features may not work on server without the mods installed on client-side.

### Low Spec Requirements

From the tests using the (Budget PC) Intel Core i5-3570K CPU and Radeon RX 570 we average 50-60 frames per second both on singleplayer and Hypixel Network. If you experience lag, change the graphic settings or shaderpack settings (or just disable the shaders).

### Frequent Updates

We update the mod frequently with new mods, texture packs and bug fixes. If you have any suggestions or complaints, feel free to contact us.

---
**FAQ** (frequently asked questions)

> **Q:** Are you gonna update to the future versions?
>>  **A:** Probably in around a week after the release of the Minecraft version. We have to wait for the new versions of mods for the newly released version.

> **Q:** Am i free to modify the modpack contents?
> > **A:** Yes, you are. Feel free to modify our modpacks, but for personal use only.
